song_name: Do That To Me One More Time

versions.song_name: Do That To Me One More Time
versions.version_description: 1980 US number one try playing as very slow bossa nova.

versions.song_name: Do That To Me One More Time
versions.version_description: New version for piano and bass. All accurate chords with the right bass notes (often slashed). Based on YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=033b90AnkKg.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Dont Let The Sun Go Down On Me

recommended.version_description: Complete chords in original key / strumming pattern / chord voicings / https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VhuU8KDLdO4.

content:
[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  x2

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Do that to me one more time[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Once is never enough with a man like you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
Do that to me one more time[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
I can never get enough of a man like you, oh[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Caug[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
Kiss me like you just did...[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]  N.C.                   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, baby, do that to me once again[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Pass that by me one more time[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Once just isn't enough for my heart to hear[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Whoa, tell it to me one more time[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
I can never hear enough while I got ya near, oh[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Caug[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
Say those words again that you just did...[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    N.C.                    [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Oh, baby tell it to me once again...[/tab]

[Solo]

[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Gaug[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
